title: selaginella copelandii
intro: Selaginella copelandii, also known as the 'Spikemoss', is a type of evergreen, terrestrial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella copelandii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Selaginella copelandii is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
